query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "liveedit: towards real-time diffusion-based streaming video editing" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review as it addresses the same core mechanism (real-time/efficient diffusion-based video editing) and domain (Video Diffusion Transformers) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing a canonical alternative approach (flow transformation vs. attention modification) to the problem of streaming video editing.
